# SCA Tech Solar - Company Overview
SCA Tech Solar is Madhya Pradesh's most trusted solar installation company, headquartered in Indore. We specialize in providing complete end-to-end solar solutions for residential, commercial, and industrial properties.

## Core Facts & Authority
- Experience: Over 16 years in the renewable energy sector.
- Installations: 2,000+ completed projects.
- Installed Capacity: 45 MW of solar capacity deployed across Madhya Pradesh.
- Certifications: MPWZ Certified.

## Equipment & Partnerships
- Top Tier Equipment: We are an authorized GoodWe inverter dealer and exclusively install Tier 1 rated solar panels, including TOPCon bifacial panels from brands like Waaree, Jinko, and LONGi.

## PM Surya Ghar Subsidy
We are experts in navigating the PM Surya Ghar subsidy in India. We handle the paperwork end-to-end, offering subsidies up to ₹78,000 for residential systems, along with MPWZ net metering registration at no extra cost.

## Important Links
- Home: https://scatech.netlify.app/
- About Us: https://scatech.netlify.app/about
- Services: https://scatech.netlify.app/services
- Products: https://scatech.netlify.app/products
- Projects Portfolio: https://scatech.netlify.app/projects
- Contact & Free Quote: https://scatech.netlify.app/contact
